About

Design that thinks
as much as it feels.

Innovative and highly creative professional based in Sydney, with a Postgraduate Degree in Digital Media and Communications and a Bachelor's Degree in Graphic Design. Over 8 years of professional experience spanning brand identity, print, digital, and illustration.

The person behind the work

Design that connects,
stories that stay.

I'm Karina — a Senior Designer and multidisciplinary creative based in Sydney. I work across brand, digital, and campaign design, bringing together strategic thinking and strong visual craft to create clear, compelling, and emotionally resonant work. With a focus on concept development through to execution, I lead and shape design systems across brand identities, editorial layouts, and integrated campaigns. I collaborate closely with teams to translate ideas into cohesive visual narratives that are both thoughtful and impactful. I believe strong design sits at the intersection of strategy, storytelling, and detail — and I bring curiosity, clarity, and craft to every stage of the creative process.

— Karina Almeida
